text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Countless top racers have gathered here at Tokyo
Racecourse in Fuchu! But only one gets to take
home the trophy! Ladies and gentlemen, the
autumn Tenno Sho will begin shortly!
...Allow me to see what you're made of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: There's something I'd like to say before the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I ask that you watch closely, and witness the
instance in which all the moments we've shared
come together to shatter the preordained
outcome.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I shall do my best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(The journey has been long, and yet it also feels
as brief as a moment.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(My heart holds more moments still—more
moments than there are stars in the sky.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Those vivid and dazzling days my precious rivals
gifted me...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Wonderful memories of the races in which we
surpassed our limits together...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I shall turn each and every one of these moments
into the shining light of my current self.)
